project.name: TILDA - Land Use
project.description: TILDA processes land use areas from OpenStreetMap data to provide context for bicycle infrastructure planning.

tags.description: Allotment areas are processed to characterize surrounding land use context for bicycle infrastructure planning.
Brownfield sites are processed to characterize surrounding land use context for bicycle infrastructure planning.
